name: Backdoor IAM User with Federated Token
description: Simulates an attacker using sts:GetFederationToken to mint long-lived federated credentials (up to 36 hours) with an attacker-controlled inline policy, providing persistent access that survives access key rotation.
prerequisites: None — requires sts:GetFederationToken permission (available to IAM users, not roles)
detection_signal: sts:GetFederationToken called with a permissive inline policy or from an unexpected principal; federated sessions appear in CloudTrail with token source info
